name: chifor-claude
description: Personal Claude Code plugins and dotfiles for cchifor — shareable across machines.

plugins.name: codex-toolkit
plugins.description: Dispatch OpenAI Codex CLI as a Claude Code subagent and drive an Opus<->Codex plan-review loop. Includes the codex dispatcher subagent and the codex-reviewed-planning skill.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Generate full-stack projects (Python/FastAPI, Node/Fastify, Rust/Axum backends; Vue/Svelte/Flutter frontends) using the forge CLI in headless mode.

plugins.name: writing-a-readme
plugins.description: Generate or audit a project's README.md against a fixed structure. Auto-detects project type from manifest files and applies per-section templates.

plugins.name: cleanup-local-resources
plugins.description: Safely reclaim local dev-box resources: docker images/build-cache/volumes, package caches, stale git branches/worktrees, build artifacts, and zombie processes. Auto-applies a regenerable safe tier; aggressive actions are opt-in and guarded.

plugins.name: reviewer-agent
plugins.description: Autonomous agent that monitors a GitHub repo's open PRs and drives each toward a clean, mergeable state: analyze -> fix -> Codex cross-review -> local docker-compose validation -> push -> merge (native auto-merge where available, gated direct merge otherwise). Repo and tooling are parameters; runs single-pass, in-session /loop, or as a cron routine.
